verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Burdens now are lighter Brighter is my way It is such a joy to walk with Him When this journey here is o'er I'll set my feet on heaven's shore Eternity all joy will just begin.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh glory, glory hallelujah Praise the Lord today I know I'm free He is with me and if I stay close to Him Safe from harm and danger I will be.
